evals.prompt:
Format this BMI report for email:
BMI: 22.5 (Normal)
Your BMI is in the healthy range.

Health Tips:
- Continue balanced nutrition
- Maintain regular exercise
- Stay hydrated
evals.expected_output: HTML email with BMI result, health tips, and disclaimer.
assertions: Output contains HTML tags (not plain text or markdown)
BMI value 22.5 is present in the output
BMI category Normal is present in the output
Health tips are included in the output
Disclaimer about medical advice is included

evals.prompt:
Create email body for:
BMI: 17.8 (Underweight)

Tips:
- Eat nutrient-dense foods
- Increase meal frequency
- Add healthy fats
evals.expected_output: HTML email with BMI result and health tips.
assertions: All three health tips are included

evals.prompt: Format for email - just the BMI: 28.3 (Overweight). No tips available this time.
evals.expected_output: HTML email with BMI only, no health tips section.
